title: Carrie and Jess Save the Universe!
original_title: Carrie and Jess Save the Universe!
overview: Carrie and Jess, a couple of rad besties, take a vacation to the Beach Planet, but their plans are interrupted when they encounter the heinous Space Queen, who's using a portable black hole to usurp power from the President of Earth.
